focalfunc: func newQueryM2M(md interface{}, o *ormBase, mi *models.ModelInfo, fi *models.FieldInfo, ind reflect.Value) QueryM2Mer
funcbody:
func newQueryM2M(md interface{}, o *ormBase, mi *models.ModelInfo, fi *models.FieldInfo, ind reflect.Value) QueryM2Mer {
	qm2m := new(queryM2M)
	qm2m.md = md
	qm2m.mi = mi
	qm2m.fi = fi
	qm2m.ind = ind
	qm2m.qs = newQuerySet(o, fi.RelThroughModelInfo).(*querySet)
	return qm2m
}
